Container.Name: maverick-mcp
Container.Overview: Maverick MCP – a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server providing AI-powered stock-trading tools (technical analysis, screening, options data, etc.). Connect any MCP-compatible AI client to this SSE endpoint. Place your API keys in /mnt/user/appdata/maverick-mcp/.env before starting.

Config.Name: MCP SSE Port
Config.Description: HTTP/SSE port exposed by the Maverick MCP server.

Config.Name: AppData / Config
Config.Description: Persistent config directory. Place your .env file here.

Config.Name: ENV_FILE
Config.Description: Path (inside the container) to the .env file loaded by the entrypoint.

Config.Name: PORT
Config.Description: Port the MCP server binds to inside the container. Must match the port mapping above.
